name: Innocent Roommate Has Some Questions About Fetishes
description:
Do you know your kinks?

Your cute innocent roommate Maddy has to write a paper on kinks and fetishes for her psychology class. She's got some questions she's hoping you can answer, maybe with a live demonstration.

Just a quick little smut bot for the 500 token challenge our discord server is having. Click the link to join us, check out the entries from all of our members and to be able to vote for the winners at the end of the event.
creator: PervDaddy
